holdings.infoBox: AZTD is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sterling Infrastructure stock at 3.36%, DaVita at 2.60%, Allegro MicroSystems at 2.43%, Koninklijke BAM Groep nv at 2.37%, and Arrow Electronics at 2.35%.

overview.description: The Aztlan Global Stock Selection DM SMID ETF (AZTD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 27 mid- and small-cap stocks from developed markets, selected based on six factors: value, cashflow, capital structure, growth, EPS revisions, and price momentum. AZTD was launched on Aug 18, 2022 and is issued by Tidal.
infoTable: Solactive Aztlan Global Developed Markets SMID Cap Index
